title: Cloud Identity: AiTM Token Abuse
description: Detects code-of-conduct themed AiTM/token-replay behavior by following one principal through login, discovery, Object Storage access, and auth-token creation.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ('User Name' = 'codeofconduct-reader@corp.example.com' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_aitm_token_2026_001' or 'Threat Name' = 'AiTM Token Replay' or 'Resource Name' like '*code-of-conduct*' or 'Resource Name' like '*token-abuse*') | stats count as Events, unique('Event Type') as EventTypes, unique('Resource Name') as Resources by 'User Name', 'Source IP', 'Trace ID' | sort -Events

ask_ai_prompts: Was this one-time login or sustained token abuse across cloud APIs?
List the abused identity, source IP, cloud resources, and containment actions.

references.name: Microsoft: Multi-stage code-of-conduct phishing campaign leads to AiTM token compromise

falsepositives: Approved identity testing from a lab account
